info.title: Website Carbon API
info.description: Calculates website carbon emissions per page view using real-time tests. Provides endpoints for testing and manual calculations to increase awareness and understanding of sustainability on the web.

get.summary: Calculate emissions by bytes and green hosting
get.description: Calculate the emissions of a page by manually passing the bytes and whether or not it is powered by green hosting. Returns carbon emissions data, rating, and statistics.

parameters.name: bytes
parameters.description: The number of bytes transferred by the page on load

parameters.name: green
parameters.description: Whether the site is using environmentally sustainable hosting. Use 1 for green hosting, 0 for non-green hosting

parameters.name: legacy
parameters.description: A flag to attempt to return the statistics object based on an outdated calculation model. Only affects the statistics object. Valid values are 2 (methodology up to 19 April 2022) or 3 (methodology up to July 2024)

200.description: Successful response with carbon emissions calculation

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid parameters

bytes.description: Number of bytes you passed to the endpoint

green.description: The green hosting flag you passed to the endpoint

gco2e.description: The emissions in grams of CO2 equivalent

cleanerThan.description: A numeric value between 0 and 1 representing the percentage of pages that this result's emissions are lower than. This is in comparison to average transfer size of pages from HTTP Archive

Statistics.description: Statistics object containing detailed calculations. Note that the values in this object are mainly useful for considering different aspects of the emissions; the top level gco2e value is the most concise figure

adjustedBytes.description: The data transfer of the page load adjusted to take returning visitor caching into account. Note that all calculated emissions (gCO2e values) have factored in returning visitor caching

energy.description: The approximate amount of energy required for each page load in kWh

CO2Data.description: Object containing data relating to CO2 emissions from each page load. Provides both renewable and grid scenarios for reference. The top level emissions have been calculated based on the green hosting status

grid.description: CO2 emissions if energy is from the national grid

renewable.description: CO2 emissions if energy is renewable

grams.description: The approximate CO2 emissions from the page load in grams

litres.description: The CO2 in grams converted to litres

tags.name: Emissions Calculation
tags.description: Calculate carbon emissions for websites based on data transfer and hosting type

externalDocs.description: Website Carbon Calculator - How does it work?
